data.title: Update project docs to reflect Jira bridge outbound LINK/UNLINK sync
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new LINK/UNLINK event processing capabilities in bridge-outbound.py.
**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate documentation about the bridge capabilities to work effectively with the sync system.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section if bridge capabilities are documented there, update ticket-cli-reference.md if it documents bridge event types, update ADR 0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md to reflect LINK/UNLINK support, update sync-event-format contract if it lists supported event types, update bridge-alert-event contract if new alert reasons are added
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, changes to code or tests

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, existing documentation accurately describes LINK and UNLINK as supported outbound bridge event types
  <- Satisfies: "bridge-outbound.py processes LINK events"
- When this story is complete, the bridge alert contract documents the new alert reasons for link sync failures
  <- Satisfies: "Jira rejection handled gracefully: writes bridge_alert"
